scripts.load-test:1000: set CONCURRENCY=1000&& set RAMP_SECONDS=60&& set STEADY_SECONDS=60&& npm run load-test
scripts.load-test:5000: set CONCURRENCY=5000&& set RAMP_SECONDS=120&& set STEADY_SECONDS=120&& npm run load-test
scripts.load-test:custom: set CONCURRENCY=%CONCURRENCY%&& set RAMP_SECONDS=%RAMP_SECONDS%&& set STEADY_SECONDS=%STEADY_SECONDS%&& npm run load-test
scripts.load-test:k6:quick: k6 run tests/load/load-test.js -e QUICK=true -e MAX_VUS=100 -e STEADY_MINUTES=0
scripts.load-test:k6:500:quick: k6 run tests/load/load-test.js -e QUICK=true -e MAX_VUS=500 -e STEADY_MINUTES=1
scripts.load-test:k6:10000:quick: k6 run tests/load/load-test.js -e QUICK=true -e MAX_VUS=10000 -e STEADY_MINUTES=1
scripts.load-test:k6:50000:quick: k6 run tests/load/load-test.js -e QUICK=true -e MAX_VUS=50000 -e STEADY_MINUTES=1
scripts.load-test:k6:1000:quick: k6 run tests/load/load-test.js -e QUICK=true -e MAX_VUS=1000 -e STEADY_MINUTES=1
scripts.load-test:k6:5000:quick: k6 run tests/load/load-test.js -e QUICK=true -e MAX_VUS=5000 -e STEADY_MINUTES=1
scripts.load-test:real-auth: set LOAD_TEST_REAL_AUTH=true&& set RESULTS_FILE=load-test-results-real-auth.json&& set REPORT_FILE=load-test-report-real-auth.html&& node tests/load/load-test-runner-real-auth-100.js && start load-test-report-real-auth.html
scripts.test:rate-limit: set LOAD_TEST=true&& node tests/rate-limit/rate-limit-test.js && start rate-limit-test-report.html
